fo.resourcePack.modmenuhelper: §7Lists mods' main features and options in Mod Menu§r
modmenu.dropInfo.line1: §9🛠§r/§8🛠§r - Fabulously Optimized mod, list of available options
modmenu.dropInfo.line2: §3§l📥§r - custom resource pack required to see effect
modmenu.summaryTranslation.betterblocken:
Faster chests, signs, beds etc.
§9🛠§8 In Video Settings: supported blocks, animations, ...

OptiFine's Better Grass & Snow (opt-in)
§9🛠§8 Mode, supported blocks, exceptions

Shows food and XP while on a mob
§8§m🛠§8 (no options)
modmenu.summaryTranslation.cape-provider:
Custom cape support
§9🛠§8 Providers, only own cape, elytra texture, ...

OptiFine's Connected & Emissive Textures

Helps you report crashes and fix known ones
§8🛠 (only advanced options)
modmenu.summaryTranslation.cwb:
Full screen with Alt+Tab support (opt-in)
§9🛠§8 In Video Settings: toggle mod, ...
sodium.options.fullscreen_mode.tooltip: Exclusive fullscreen can improve latency, but may prevent some input methods from working and slow down switching out of the game. Borderless fullscreen can be configured in Cubes Without Borders options.
modmenu.summaryTranslation.debugify:
Fixes bugs, makes telemetry toggleable
§9🛠§8 Toggle fixes, ...
modmenu.summaryTranslation.dynamic_fps:
Reduces FPS in the background
§9🛠§8 Toggle mod, restore on hover, ...
modmenu.summaryTranslation.e4mc:
Open worlds to Internet, just like LAN
§9🛠§8 Use and configure via "<lang menu.shareToLan>"

Stops rendering mobs behind walls
§9🛠§8 Toggle mod, disable for (block)entities, ...

fo.resourcePack.fastbettergrass:
§7OptiFine's Better Grass (fast)§r
§4Must be the first to work§r
accessibility.onboarding.screen.title:
Welcome to §7Fabulously Optimized§r! Here are some tips.

§f🪟§r Connected Textures and Dynamic Lights - configure in §7Mods§r
§a🏞§r Better Grass and full screen with Alt+Tab - enable in §7Video Settings§r
§e✨§r Shaders and fancy resource packs - just §7add and enable§r
§5🎮§r Game controllers supported - simply §7connect and use§r
§3🛜§r Play with friends, anywhere - press §7Open to Internet§r in singleplayer
§8📸§r Take 4K screenshots - press §7F9§r
§6🏴§r Free custom capes - §7https://download.fo/cape§r
§b🌐§r Help translate the modpack - §7https://download.fo/translate§r
§2➕§r Add extra mods - §7https://download.fo/add§r
§4❓§r Problems or questions - §7https://download.fo/wiki§r

(§7Maximize window§r or visit §7https://download.fo/tutorial§r)
